english: You've unlocked your fourth weapon skill. Press 4 or click your fourth hotkey to unleash your new attack. As a thief, your third weapon skill changes based on the combination of your main-hand and off-hand weapons. Look at the Hero panel under Weapon Skills to learn more.

Your Majesty,I write this knowing it will never reach your eyes. I've been faithfully yours since the moment I entered your service—I have never wavered, and I never will. I tell you this because you may not understand what I'm about to do. I belong to you, yes, but also to the dark god. He has shown me how to end this war. And the price is steep.I will read this scroll, fully knowing the consequences. Orr will be gone. Perhaps forgotten. But it will not be remembered as a land conquered by brutes. To me, that is worth the sacrifice. I'm sorry, old friend—and I hope one day, when we meet in the afterlife, you will greet me with forgiveness.

Your wallet's look and feel have been updated! We've also moved the wallet from your Hero panel to your Inventory, so look there to check out the changes. Use the new Wallet button in the lower left of your Inventory to toggle wallet mode on and off. In wallet mode, the top of the wallet has a drop-down list, where you may select from different categories to make it easier to view the desired currency. Currencies are also now in a list format to make the information more compact and allow for easier additions. Finally, while in Inventory view, gold will always be displayed, but the second currency listed at the bottom of the panel will change to display whatever currency is appropriate to the map you currently occupy.The following items have been converted to currencies:•Bandit Crests•Geodes•Pristine Fractal Relics•WvW Tournament Tickets•Spirit Shards (formerly Skill Points)This conversion is automatic, but you will have to log in with each character to get the items from their inventories deposited into the wallet.

Yu Joon:  We rarely see eye to eye, but it's in our nation's interest that we continue to share information on our respective investigations.Despite the repeated insistence of your new "assistant," we have uncovered no evidence of Ankka at the reactor. The idea that an outsider could weaponize your technology in a way that you hadn't considered is...hard to believe. Even I have to admit, no one knows jade better than you.What we have recovered is a log in which the pirate "Ivan" clearly states you were their mark all along. This very pirate has since been spotted in the company of the other suspects.The cleanest explanation continues to be that the dragon champion used their dragon's magic. Your pet pirates betrayed you. That's where the facts lead.These outsiders are not worthy of your trust. Do not let them fool you again.—Minister Li Ha-Eung
